---
name: Robot incident
about: Any unexpected physical behavior on the real G1 (falls, oscillation, thermal)
labels: incident, safety
---

> Fill this out as soon as the robot is SAFE (damped/powered off, battery state noted).

**When / where** (date, venue/lab, gantry or free-standing, tethered?)

**What the robot did** (entry/exit/mid-dance; oscillation, fall, saturation…)

**Operator actions** (B-damp used? app STOP? power cut?)

**Run artifacts** (required)
- Run log: `data/shows/<run>/run.log`
- Telemetry npz:
- Policy + motion (name + SHA):

**Injuries / damage** (people, robot, surroundings)
